title: Error: Frames Frame1 and Frame2 are overlapping
breadcrumbs: Error: Frames Frame1 and Frame2 are overlapping
text: Error: Frames Frame1 and Frame2 are overlapping This message is generated when the Migration Utility detects entity or printer frames that are overlapping. Problem When an entity frame is positioned on top of the border of another entity, migration to Uniface 10 might result in an incorrect component structure. Note: This is most likely to occur in Form components, but it is possible that older components created with the frame-in-frame technique, or in components converted from forms. Resolution In Uniface 9, correct the component to prevent the overlap and clarify the component structure. Then migrate the component again. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
